title: hieracium rupicola subsp. sonchifolium
intro: Hieracium rupicola subsp. sonchifolium, also known as the hawkweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and native to Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium rupicola subsp. sonchifolium include its ability to alleviate symptoms of diarrhea, fever, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant may include infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
